messages.text: A curse of tongues twists your words to gibberish; you cannot shape a single word of power.
{name}'s speech twists to gibberish under a curse of tongues.
The curse of tongues lifts and your voice returns to you.
The curse of tongues twisting {name}'s speech lifts.
{name} is cursed with tongues, their speech twisted to gibberish and unable to voice a spell.
